'''Kol Huro V''' was the fifth planet of the [[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro system]]. Like other planets in the system, Kol Huro V was harvested for its natural resources during the years leading up to the Battle of Naboo, as the tyrant who controlled the system began mass-producing weapons and battle droids for his own protection.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{Imo}}
